audits.summary: Comprehensive security review of Aave Protocol v3.3.0 with all findings at INFO level and verified as FIXED. No CRITICAL or MAJOR issues identified.

audits.scope: Aave V3.3.0 contest-based audit with 900+ participants
audits.summary: Public security contest with 900+ verified participants submitting 950+ findings. No critical or high-severity vulnerabilities identified. Some compromises accepted (GHO deficit handling, uint256.max liquidation edge case).

audits.scope: Aave V3 Risk-Steward formal verification and Solidity security review
audits.summary: Formal verification and security assessment of V3 Risk-Steward component. Conducted from June 5 to June 20, 2024 with focus on verified properties and security framework.

audits.scope: Aave V3 core protocol smart contracts
audits.summary: Comprehensive audit of Aave V3 core protocol. Part of initial V3 launch security program with multiple auditors. No major issues identified.

audits.scope: Aave V3 core protocol and V3.0.1 upgrade
audits.summary: Two audit engagements: initial V3 audit (01-27-2022) and V3.0.1 upgrade audit (12-23-2022). Security assessment of core protocol and upgrade logic.

audits.scope: Aave V3 core protocol smart contracts
audits.summary: Initial V3 launch audit. Part of coordinated multi-firm security assessment with focus on core contract logic and integration patterns.

audits.scope: Aave V3 core protocol smart contracts
audits.summary: Initial security audit of Aave V3 as part of launch preparation. Comprehensive review of core protocol architecture, access controls, and logic.
Formal verification of Aave V3 protocol properties. Conducted Nov 2021 - Jan 2022. Mathematical proofs of critical protocol invariants and security properties.

exploit_history.description: Avraham Eisenberg (Mango Markets exploiter) attempted to short CRV on Aave V2 using USDC collateral. Strategy exploited illiquidity in CRV market and liquidation logic flaws. While the attack failed, liquidations resulted in $1.6M bad debt due to slippage and price impact.

dependencies.notes: Primary oracle provider for price feeds across Aave V3. Chainlink CCIP used for cross-chain messaging and GHO token transfers between networks.
Custom oracle implementation for correlated assets (wrapped tokens, staked derivatives). Used for assets with strong correlation to underlying.
Cross-chain interoperability protocol for GHO stablecoin. Lock-and-mint model on Ethereum/L2s, burn-and-mint between non-Ethereum chains. Rate and bridge limits implemented for risk mitigation.
Historical dependency highlighted by Nov 2022 CRV exploit. CRV is a listed collateral asset on Aave. Market illiquidity created systemic risk in liquidation scenarios.
Primary deployment layer. Multi-chain architecture with Governance V3 supporting cross-chain execution via storage proofs.

rationale: Aave V3 has undergone extensive multi-firm security assessment across 7+ auditors including Trail of Bits, OpenZeppelin, SigmaPrime, and Certora formal verification. The protocol demonstrated resilience to the Nov 2022 CRV attempted exploit through Safety Module coverage, though the incident highlighted liquidation mechanics vulnerabilities. Recent V3.3 upgrades passed comprehensive Sherlock contest with 900+ participants and zero critical/high-severity findings, indicating strong ongoing security posture.
